name: Remix: NIFTY Options Trading Terminal
description:
Intraday Options Buyer Terminal for NIFTY trading, featuring multi-timeframe analytics, order flow scalper Mode, custom Black-Scholes Greeks, strategy payoffs, and DuckDB querying.
Higher Timeframe MARKET Structure analysis and tick based lower timeframe microstructure analysis TAB ->Order Flow Visualizer: Absorption & Vacuum
Heatmap (Depth), Dots (Trades). Absorption (Diamond) shows rejection; Vacuum (Triangle) shows removed liquidity.
